sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111532" key="filote/xnhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλοτέχν-ης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n111532.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">φιλότεχνος</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1617.tlg001:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polem.Phgn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">21</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1617.tlg001:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
